pageContext.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
pageContext.description: The 6-inch, highly articulated action EAA (Egg Attack Action) figure from Beast Kingdom is ready to launch a new wave of Star Wars figurines with the launch of the Obi-Wan Kenobi EAA-146.  Restoring the classic characters' charm and clothing, the collection includes the use of real cloth for the entire suit. Obi-Wan's iconic blue eyes and wavy hair are in full force with the highly detailed head sculpt. No Jedi will complete without his trusted lightsaber also included in the set. For fans of the heroic Jedi this is one set not to be missed.
